data.descriptionShort: Train with Shay Mitchell and get strong, focused, & fit, together.
data.descriptionLong: Shay Mitchell turned to trainer Kelsey Heenan to get in the best shape of her life—now you can join them for your own total-body makeover. Train day by day with Shay and feel more powerful, together, as you both dial in the focus to build a lean, strong body in only 4 weeks.

modules.categories: Strength, Muscle Building, Cardio, Weight Loss

modules.title: Is 4 Weeks of Focus Right for Me?
modules.content:
Need to refocus on your health and fitness? 4 Weeks of Focus is your fast track to a lean, powerful body.

From Day 1, you’re part of the crew—join actress Shay Mitchell on her journey to get the best results possible with trainer Kelsey Heenan. Kelsey’s metabolic strength training technique blends resistance with cardio moves using supersets, trisets, and circuits to keep the pace fast and the rest short. That’s how you stay locked in and get strong as you shape and firm your whole body, fast.

modules.title: What Are the 4 Weeks of Focus Workouts Like?
modules.content:
These 20 workouts are part fitness bootcamp, part buddy movie, and all fun as Kelsey leads you, Shay, and Steph through powerful HIIT and strength training 5 days a week, 30-45 mins a day.

Total-Body Strength: Fire up your metabolism and define your shoulders, arms, glutes, and thighs with supersets and trisets.

High-Intensity Power: Make each and every rep count as you focus on proper form while improving stability, mobility, and overall power.

Metabolic Sweat: Shay's favorite! Crush calories using only a light pair of dumbbells in these fast-paced resistance circuits.

Lower and Upper Body Strength: These targeted training days lift, shape, and firm in all the right places.

modules.title: Tools and Equipment
modules.content:
You just need a pair of light and medium dumbbells to get going. Kelsey designed these workouts for Shay in a specific sequence that ramps up the intensity over the weeks, so she (and you) stay challenged as you work up to heavier weights. Find the Workout Calendar under the Program Materials tab and follow it in the same order to get total-body results like Shay.

You’ll also find the eating plan Quick Start Guides under Program Materials to help you figure out which to pair with your workouts. These tools are designed to maximize your results over the next 4 weeks, so we recommend you download them, save them to your phone, or print them out.

modules.title: Nourish Your Body
modules.content:
Complete your Health Esteem routine with our healthy eating plans, 2B Mindset or Portion Fix (free with a BODi subscription). Simple and satisfying, no deprivation, and all you have to do is watch a few short videos to get started. Plus, you’ll have access to over 1,000 yummy recipes! 

Give your body the nutrients and fuel it needs to power through your workouts. Shakeology is yummy superfood nutrition—protein, antioxidants, supergreens, adaptogens, prebiotics, and more—to help support energy, digestion, cravings, and lean muscle. 

With our Performance line, you’ll power through each workout from start to finish, through recovery. Energize is a clean pre-workout formula to help give you a boost of energy and sharpened focus. And Recover is a post-workout formula with 20g of protein plus antioxidants to help build muscle and alleviate post-workout soreness.

modules.title: Get the Support You Need
modules.content: Connect with your Partner to join their accountability group and get a support system you can count on. You’ll find friends to celebrate your wins and cheer you on when you need it most—or welcome you back with gentle accountability when life gets in the way. It’s your community of like-minded people who always have your back and keep you moving forward.

modules.title: Success Story: Tierra D.
modules.content:
Lost 11.6 lbs. in 4 Weeks

“My self-esteem has gotten the biggest boost, knowing I’m doing something that’s truly working. I can see and feel the changes as I go.”

trainers.bio: Kelsey is an MBSC certified functional strength coach and a Precision Nutrition certified nutrition coach who’s helped thousands of clients—including celebrities, professional athletes, and Olympians—reach their goals. She’s a motivation machine with an amazing way of helping you believe in yourself through her challenging and effective programs. What’s even better, she’ll help you build healthy habits while improving your relationship with food and exercise so you can create a lifestyle you truly enjoy.

841bZan1gTOI6kyWXqyNua.title: Introducing 2B Mindset
841bZan1gTOI6kyWXqyNua.descriptionLong: 2B Mindset, created by Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, is designed to help you enjoy satisfying meals, achieve a healthy relationship with food and make reaching your goals a positive experience. This proven plan has helped thousands of Ilana’s clients reach their goals, and it’s how Ilana lost 100 lbs. and kept it off as a mother of three. With a BODi membership, you’ll get new recipes every month, plus 24/7 access to the 2B Mindset Exclusive Community, which includes ongoing support from Ilana with LIVE calls, to help you feel your best each day.

trainers.bio: Ilana Muhlstein holds a Master of Science degree in applied nutrition from Northeastern University and is a Registered Dietitian Nutritionist—the highest standard in the field of nutrition. She is also a mother of 3. She’s the creator of 2B Pregnant and the 2B Mindset eating plan, and author of the bestselling book You Can Drop It! She was an obese child who lost over 100 pounds using the principles that became 2B Mindset.

A6EEdFOzPQoJVaLycZMppN.title: Introducing Portion Fix
A6EEdFOzPQoJVaLycZMppN.descriptionLong: Portion Fix, by fitness and nutrition expert Autumn Calabrese, helps you eat the portions that work for the results you want. You’ll enjoy all the delicious foods you love, even wine and chocolate, and NEVER feel deprived. And there’s no counting calories or cutting food groups. This plan can help you reach your goals, whether it’s weight loss, or just feeling healthier and stronger. With a BODi membership, you’ll get new recipes every month, plus 24/7 access to the Portion Fix Exclusive Community, which includes ongoing support from Autumn, to help you feel great every single day.

trainers.bio: Super Trainer and nutrition expert Autumn Calabrese is the creator of The 4 Week Gut Protocol, as well as other breakthrough fitness programs, the cooking show FIXATE, and the Portion Fix eating plan. She’s a certified holistic health coach through the Institute of Integrative Nutrition and has held certifications from NASM and AFPA.
